videos.title: Forests are now playable in Standard!
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a monogreen landfall ramp deck, featuring Nissa, Ascended Animist, Llanowar Elves and Mossborn Hydra from Foundations in Standard.
